[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 10000100 2
4 10100100 3
5 10100000 2
6 10100100 3
7 00000000 a

01 10 11011100 5
12 21 10100100 3 match 4 6
23 32 10100100 3 match 4 6
34 43 10100000 2 match 5
45 54 10100010 3
56 65 00000100 1
67 76 00000100 1
70 07 11010100 4

35 53 10100100 3 match 4 6
46 64 00000000 a match 0 1 2 7
57 75 10110101 5

71 17 11110100 5
